scripts.deps: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: bash scripts/build_disco.sh && bash scripts/build_daisy.sh seed/Blink && bash scripts/build_daisy.sh seed/OLED && bash scripts/build_daisy.sh seed/Button
scripts.start:backend: cross-env RENODE_ROBOT_PORT=55555 npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n renode,backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run start:renode" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:verbose: concurrently -k -n renode,backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run start:renode:verbose" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
